feature_completeness_summary: Milestone 9 delivers the intended BattleSim launch-path regression coverage and confirms the merged code still routes through FBattleScreen-owned FTacticalGame/WXTacticalUI setup, but full GUI scenario-completion and runtime-equivalence validation remain an accepted deferred follow-up.

warning_findings.summary: AC2/AC3 full BattleSim runtime validation remains deferred and requires next-cycle GUI automation planning.

note_findings.summary: Merged BattleSim launchers still use modal stack-owned FBattleScreen flows and FBattleScreen still owns FTacticalGame/WXTacticalUI installation.
The accepted GUI-validation deferment is documented accurately in the remediation artifacts and does not overclaim AC2/AC3 completion.

follow_up_feature_requests: Provision automated GUI runtime validation infrastructure for SSW/BattleSim (for example xvfb-run plus interaction tooling) and add a reproducible BattleSim scenario-completion test flow that proves a full tactical battle can run to completion under the Milestone 9 architecture.

After GUI automation is available, capture explicit runtime-behavior-equivalence evidence for BattleSim versus the expected pre-refactor FBattleScreen experience, and persist the validation results in milestone artifacts suitable for future signoff.
